caption: The video features a woman sitting in what appears to be a podcast studio, as indicated by the "Boss Talk 101" logo and branding visible on the screen. She is wearing headphones and has her hair styled in an updo. The woman is engaged in conversation, speaking into a microphone placed in front of her. Her expression suggests she is actively listening or responding to someone off-camera. The background includes a television screen displaying the name "Johnson," and there is a door with a sign that reads "Employees Only." The setting is professional, likely designed for recording audio content such as podcasts or interviews.
